list.title: 📦 Snapshots for this server
list.empty: No snapshots saved yet for this server.

restore.not_found: ❌ Snapshot `{version}` not found for this server.

import.ok: ✅ Imported snapshot `{version}` ({rows} rows). Use `/backup restore version:{version}` to apply it.
import.invalid: ❌ Not a valid MultiBot snapshot file.
import.wrong_guild: ❌ This snapshot belongs to a different server (guild `{guild}`).

export.title: 📤 Snapshot export
export.footer: Keep this file safe — it contains every server config.

migrate.running: ⏫ Running migrations… current schema: v{from} → v{to}
migrate.done: ✅ Migrations complete — schema is now at v{to}.
migrate.up_to_date: ✅ Schema is already up to date (v{version}).

auto.status_off: **OFF** — use `/backup auto-enable` to turn it on.
auto.missing_channel: ❌ Please choose a channel with the `channel` option when delivery is set to `channel`.
